entry.title: VIDÉO - Cherbourg : quand les Yamakasis s’envoient en l’air

link.title: VIDÉO - Cherbourg : quand les Yamakasis s’envoient en l’air

entry.content: Du 24 au 28 août, de nombreux enfants cherbourgeois ont pu suivre un entraînement d’art du déplacement. Mehdi Adim, coach d’ADD a partagé sa passion et son savoir-faire.
entry.summary: Du 24 au 28 août, de nombreux enfants cherbourgeois ont pu suivre un entraînement d’art du déplacement. Mehdi Adim, coach d’ADD a partagé sa passion et son savoir-faire.

entry.title: नो स्कूल नो फीस को लेकर 31 अगस्त को राजस्थान बंद

link.title: नो स्कूल नो फीस को लेकर 31 अगस्त को राजस्थान बंद

entry.content:
31 अगस्त को होगा राजस्थान बंद
व्यापार मंडल, करणी सेना का मिला अभिभावकों को समर्थन
नो स्कूल, नो फीस को लेकर पहली बार राजस्थान बंद 31 अगस्त को होगा। संयुक्त अभिभावक समिमि के बैनर तले होने वाले इस बंद को शहर के कई व्यापार संगठनों, सामाजिक संगठनों और जनप्रतिनिधियों सहित करणी सेना ने समर्थन दिया है।समिति के संयोजक सुशील शर्मा और प्रवक्ता ईशान शर्मा ने कहा कि स्कूल मालिक लगातार फीस जमा करवाने का दबाब डाल रहे हैं लेकिन सरकार कोई निर्णय नहीं ले रही। सरकार की चुप्पी से अभिभावक खुद को ठगा सा महसूस कर रहे हैं। ऐसे में सरकार को नींद से जगाने के लिए और फीस माफ किए जाने की मांग को लेकर स्वैच्छिक राजस्थान बंद का आह्वान किया गया है। शनिवार को आयोजित एक प्रेसवार्ता में समिति के महामंत्री मनीष विजयवर्गीय ने बताया कि बंद के समर्थन को लेकर समिति के पदाधिकारियों ने जयपुर और प्रदेश के व्यापार मंडलों, सामाजिक संगठनों और जनप्रतिनिधियों से सम्पर्क किया था। प्रदेश के 450 से अधिक संगठनों ने बंद का समर्थन करते हुए समिति का साथ दिया है। उन्होंने कहा कि यदि अभिभावकों कीपीड़ा की ओर ध्यान नहीं दिया गया तो अभिभावक चुप नहीं बैठेंगे वह अपना हक लेकर रहेंगे।
entry.summary: 31 अगस्त को होगा राजस्थान बंद व्यापार मंडल, करणी सेना का मिला अभिभावकों को समर्थन नो स्कूल, नो फीस को लेकर पहली बार राजस्थान बंद 31 अगस्त को होगा। संयुक्त अभिभावक समिमि के बैनर तले होने वाले इस बंद को शहर के कई व्यापार संगठनों, सामाजिक संगठनों और जनप्रतिनिधियों सहित करणी सेना ने समर्थन दिया है।समिति के संयोजक सुशील शर्मा और प्रवक्ता ईशान शर्मा ने कहा कि स्कूल मालिक लगातार फीस जमा करवाने का दबाब डाल रहे हैं लेकिन सरकार कोई निर्णय नहीं ले रही। सरकार की चुप्पी से अभिभावक खुद को ठगा सा महसूस कर रहे हैं। ऐसे में सरकार को नींद से जगाने के लिए और फीस माफ किए जाने की मांग को लेकर स्वैच्छिक राजस्थान बंद का आह्वान किया गया है। शनिवार को आयोजित एक प्रेसवार्ता में समिति के महामंत्री मनीष विजयवर्गीय ने बताया कि बंद के समर्थन को लेकर समिति के पदाधिकारियों ने जयपुर और प्रदेश के व्यापार मंडलों, सामाजिक संगठनों और जनप्रतिनिधियों से सम्पर्क किया था। प्रदेश के 450 से अधिक संगठनों ने बंद का समर्थन करते हुए समिति का साथ दिया है। उन्होंने कहा कि यदि अभिभावकों कीपीड़ा की ओर ध्यान नहीं दिया गया तो अभिभावक चुप नहीं बैठेंगे वह अपना हक लेकर रहेंगे।

entry.title: Daniel Theis, Robert Williams dominate center matchup in Celtics Raptors Garden Report

link.title: Daniel Theis, Robert Williams dominate center matchup in Celtics Raptors Garden Report

entry.content:
The Celtics sat Enes Kanter and received 23 points and 20 rebounds between Daniel Theis and Robert Williams III. Marc Gasol struggled, while Serge Ibaka hit Williams hard from the three-point line before faltering later and picking up a flagrant foul against Theis. The matchup inside keyed a 112-96 win for the Celtics in Game 1 that the Garden Report broke down in full here:

The matchup inside keyed a 112-96 win for the Celtics in Game 1 that the Garden Report broke down in full here: The CLNS Media Network is the leading provider for video/audio content. entry.title: Hong Kong activist leads Berlin protest against Chinese regime

link.title: Hong Kong activist leads Berlin protest against Chinese regime

entry.content: Several hundred demonstrators, including Hong Kong activist Nathan Law, gather outside the German Foreign Ministry in Berlin to denounce the Chinese government as German Foreign Minister Heiko Maas prepares to meet his Chinese counterpart Wang Yi. Full story:
entry.summary: Several hundred demonstrators, including Hong Kong activist Nathan Law, gather outside the German Foreign Ministry in Berlin to denounce the Chinese government as German Foreign Minister Heiko Maas prepares to meet his Chinese counterpart Wang Yi. Full story:

entry.title: Japanese department store Isetan closes in Bangkok as COVID-19 decimates tourism

link.title: Japanese department store Isetan closes in Bangkok as COVID-19 decimates tourism

entry.content:
Hundreds of shoppers converge on a department store for closing down sale - 30 years after it first opened in Bangkok, Thailand.
The Japanese outlet named Isetan had been one of the most popular stores for locals looking for clothes, makeup and household items from the Far East.
However, it closed for the final time yesterday (August 31) after the owners did not renew the lease amid the Covid-19 uncertainty, which has decimated tourism in the country.
Thailand received no foreign tourist arrivals for the fourth consecutive month in July, with ministers keeping borders closed to prevent Covid-19 spreading.
There have been no local transmissions for more than three months. However, the country’s tourism reliant economy accounting for up to 20 per cent of GDP has been shattered - shrinking at its deepest pace since the 1998 Asian crisis.
entry.summary: Hundreds of shoppers converge on a department store for closing down sale - 30 years after it first opened in Bangkok, Thailand. The Japanese outlet named Isetan had been one of the most popular stores for locals looking for clothes, makeup and household items from the Far East. However, it closed for the final time yesterday (August 31) after the owners did not renew the lease amid the Covid-19 uncertainty, which has decimated tourism in the country. Thailand received no foreign tourist arrivals for the fourth consecutive month in July, with ministers keeping borders closed to prevent Covid-19 spreading. There have been no local transmissions for more than three months. However, the country’s tourism reliant economy accounting for up to 20 per cent of GDP has been shattered - shrinking at its deepest pace since the 1998 Asian crisis.

entry.title: United Slashes $200 Ticket Change Fee for Domestic Flights

link.title: United Slashes $200 Ticket Change Fee for Domestic Flights

entry.content: As a way to give business a bounce during the pandemic, United Airlines said it will be getting rid of its $200 ticket-change fee. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.
entry.summary: As a way to give business a bounce during the pandemic, United Airlines said it will be getting rid of its $200 ticket-change fee. Veuer’s Justin Kircher has the story.

entry.title: Lens-PSG reporté au 10 septembre

link.title: Lens-PSG reporté au 10 septembre

entry.content: Le @PSG_inside a obtenu le report de sa rencontre à @RCLens, initialement prévue ce samedi. Ce match devait se disputer seulement 6 jours après la finale de @ChampionsLeague entre le PSG et le Bayern. Lens - PSG (2e journée de Ligue 1) se jouera donc le 10 septembre prochain.
entry.summary: Le @PSG_inside a obtenu le report de sa rencontre à @RCLens, initialement prévue ce samedi. Ce match devait se disputer seulement 6 jours après la finale de @ChampionsLeague entre le PSG et le Bayern. Lens - PSG (2e journée de Ligue 1) se jouera donc le 10 septembre prochain.

entry.title: Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 34 Season 3 (English Subtitles)

link.title: Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 34 Season 3 (English Subtitles)

entry.content:
Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 34 Season 3 (English Subtitles)
On this channel, We Will Upload all Episodes and All Seasons of Resurrection Ertugrul With English Subtitles
‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries.
entry.summary: Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 34 Season 3 (English Subtitles) On this channel, We Will Upload all Episodes and All Seasons of Resurrection Ertugrul With English Subtitles ‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries.

1989 - 1998

João Paulo Feliciano (chant et guitare)
João Oliveira (guitare)
Manuel Duarte (basse)
Pedro Falcão (batterie)

entry.title: Top 10 Real Punches You Actually See in the Movie

link.title: Top 10 Real Punches You Actually See in the Movie

entry.content: These actors took the hits and kept on filming. For this list, we’ll be looking at times where actors really got hit or otherwise physically mauled while the cameras were rolling, whether self-inflicted, by design, or in the heat of the moment.
entry.summary: These actors took the hits and kept on filming. For this list, we’ll be looking at times where actors really got hit or otherwise physically mauled while the cameras were rolling, whether self-inflicted, by design, or in the heat of the moment.

entry.title: China cries foul after India’s second digital strike

link.title: China cries foul after India’s second digital strike

entry.content: In a fresh move against the Chinese mobile phone applications, the government has banned 118 more mobile apps. Popular app PUBG is among the mobile apps banned by the Information and Technology Ministry on Wednesday.
entry.summary: In a fresh move against the Chinese mobile phone applications, the government has banned 118 more mobile apps. Popular app PUBG is among the mobile apps banned by the Information and Technology Ministry on Wednesday.

entry.title: Kisah Perjuangan Kira Lauren Jadi Model Miss Popular, Hanya Modal Rp 700 Ribu

link.title: Kisah Perjuangan Kira Lauren Jadi Model Miss Popular, Hanya Modal Rp 700 Ribu

entry.content:
Kira Lauren menceritakan perjuangannya menjadi model Miss Popular saat berkunjung ke kantor Suara.com, Senin (31/8/2020).
Link berita:
Kisahnya menjadi model terbilang tak mudah, ia mengaku hanya bermodalkan Rp 700 ribu untuk bisa bergabung di Miss Popular. Selengkapnya, tonton dalam video ini.
#MissPopular #KiraLauren #Model
Video Editor: Heriyanto

entry.title: Admired by all: Politicians remember Pranab Mukherjee

link.title: Admired by all: Politicians remember Pranab Mukherjee

entry.content:
Former President and Bharat Ratna awardee Pranab Mukherjee passed away at age of 84 on August 31. His son Abhijit Mukherjee announced the news on Twitter.
Congress leader Rahul Gandhi expressed his deepest condolences on the demise of Congress veteran. Rahul Gandhi said, “With great sadness, the nation receives the news of the unfortunate demise of our former President Shri Pranab Mukherjee. I join the country in paying homage to him. My deepest condolences to the bereaved family and friends.” Lok Sabha Speaker mourned loss of former President.
He said, “I express my grief at the passing away of our former president Pranab Mukherjee. He was a very astute politician and a very knowledgable person. He always kept his professional life separate from the personal. He was an experienced administrator: Om Birla, Lok Sabha Speaker.
entry.summary: Former President and Bharat Ratna awardee Pranab Mukherjee passed away at age of 84 on August 31. His son Abhijit Mukherjee announced the news on Twitter. Congress leader Rahul Gandhi expressed his deepest condolences on the demise of Congress veteran. Rahul Gandhi said, “With great sadness, the nation receives the news of the unfortunate demise of our former President Shri Pranab Mukherjee. I join the country in paying homage to him. My deepest condolences to the bereaved family and friends.” Lok Sabha Speaker mourned loss of former President. He said, “I express my grief at the passing away of our former president Pranab Mukherjee. He was a very astute politician and a very knowledgable person. He always kept his professional life separate from the personal. He was an experienced administrator: Om Birla, Lok Sabha Speaker.

entry.title: San Diego powerlifter gets a power-fail

link.title: San Diego powerlifter gets a power-fail

entry.content: A guy is doing a clean and jerk in a room with 195 pounds and as he gets the weights up, he is unable to hold it up, and the weights fall directly on the top of his leg and knee causing him to fall to the ground, injuring himself in San Diego, California on May 31.
entry.summary: A guy is doing a clean and jerk in a room with 195 pounds and as he gets the weights up, he is unable to hold it up, and the weights fall directly on the top of his leg and knee causing him to fall to the ground, injuring himself in San Diego, California on May 31.

entry.title: Bos Jouska Ganti Rugi Klien Rp 13 Miliar

link.title: Bos Jouska Ganti Rugi Klien Rp 13 Miliar

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Kasus yang menjerat jasa perencana keuangan Jouska terus berlanjut. Sebanyak 45 klien yang sudah menyepakati jalan damai. Total Rp 13 miliar digelontorkan untuk ganti rugi.
Melalui keterangan pers, pemilik saham mayoritas PT Mahesa Strategis Indonesia sekaligus CEO PT Jouska Finansial Indonesia menjelaskan dari 63 klien yang mengajukan keluhan, baru 45 klien yang siap berdamai.
Kompensasinya beragam, mulai dari ganti rugi hingga buyback portofolio saham. Meski menempuh jalur damai, proses hukum tetap berlanjut.
Satgas Waspada Investasi menghentikan operasional Jouska karena menjadi penasehat investasi tanpa izin.
Sebelumnya, beberapa klien Jouska mengaku merugi akibat langkah Jouska mengelola keuangan mereka.
Jouska dianggap mengarahkan kliennya menggunakan pengelolaan dana milik PT Mahesa Strategis Indonesia, yang juga dengan Jouska.
Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar kamu semua tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Kasus yang menjerat jasa perencana keuangan Jouska terus berlanjut. Sebanyak 45 klien yang sudah menyepakati jalan damai. Total Rp 13 miliar digelontorkan untuk ganti rugi. Melalui keterangan pers, pemilik saham mayoritas PT Mahesa Strategis Indonesia sekaligus CEO PT Jouska Finansial Indonesia menjelaskan dari 63 klien yang mengajukan keluhan, baru 45 klien yang siap berdamai. Kompensasinya beragam, mulai dari ganti rugi hingga buyback portofolio saham. Meski menempuh jalur damai, proses hukum tetap berlanjut. Satgas Waspada Investasi menghentikan operasional Jouska karena menjadi penasehat investasi tanpa izin. Sebelumnya, beberapa klien Jouska mengaku merugi akibat langkah Jouska mengelola keuangan mereka. Jouska dianggap mengarahkan kliennya menggunakan pengelolaan dana milik PT Mahesa Strategis Indonesia, yang juga dengan Jouska. Jangan lewatkan streaming Kompas TV live 24 jam non stop di agar kamu semua tidak ketinggalan berita-berita terkini, terlengkap, serta laporan langsung dari berbagai daerah di Indonesia.

entry.title: Insecticides : une dérogation pour les néonicotinoïdes autorise leur retour sur le marché

link.title: Insecticides : une dérogation pour les néonicotinoïdes autorise leur retour sur le marché

entry.content:
Les insecticides tueurs d’abeilles interdits depuis 2018 vont de nouveau être légalisés. De quoi scandaliser les associations de défense de l’environnement. Elles craignent que ce soit la porte ouverte à d’autres dérogations.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Les insecticides tueurs d’abeilles interdits depuis 2018 vont de nouveau être légalisés. De quoi scandaliser les associations de défense de l’environnement. Elles craignent que ce soit la porte ouverte à d’autres dérogations. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Toddler Points Out States Locations on Map Of Country

link.title: Toddler Points Out States Locations on Map Of Country

entry.content: This brainy toddler showed his grandma his knowledge of the states’ locations on a map. He pointed out whatever state his mom and grandma asked him to locate and corrected himself if he didn’t get it right. His grandma looked very impressed and appreciated the kid with celebratory claps as soon as he answered their questions correctly.
entry.summary: This brainy toddler showed his grandma his knowledge of the states’ locations on a map. He pointed out whatever state his mom and grandma asked him to locate and corrected himself if he didn’t get it right. His grandma looked very impressed and appreciated the kid with celebratory claps as soon as he answered their questions correctly.
